testdata/binary/random_1kb.bin: data
testdata/binary/fake_elf.bin: ELF, unknown class 102
testdata/archives/sample.zip: Zip archive data, at least v1.0 to extract, compression method=store

testdata/edge/onebyte.txt: ASCII text
testdata/edge/empty.txt: empty
testdata/crypto/sha256_input.txt: ASCII text, with no line terminators
testdata/crypto/md5_input.txt: ASCII text, with no line terminators
